websites.description: Realtime MERN chat app built with Socket.io, JWT auth, Cloudinary, and Zustand. Send messages and photos, view online status, all in a clean responsive UI.
MERN real estate app where users discover, search, and list properties for rent or sale. Manage listings, view detailed info, and log in through a clean UI.
MERN e-commerce app with full cart, product search, and PayPal checkout. Browse items, add to cart, leave reviews, and manage orders in a responsive UI.
Practice MERN app where users sign in, add places, and view details. Strengthens fullstack skills with MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js in a simple UI.
React food store where users browse meals, add to cart, and place orders. Includes account login, quantity control, and responsive design for smooth shopping.
React clothes shop with product browsing, detail views, cart with quantity control, login flow, and a fully responsive design for a smooth shopping experience.
React task manager where users add, edit, and delete tasks with deadlines. Features completion tracking, daily task view, and Redux Toolkit for state management.
Music search app where users find songs, view artist info, and check prices. Built with React.js for a clean, responsive, and interactive listening experience.
Cocktail recipe app where users browse drinks, search by name, and view details. Designed with responsive layouts for easy access on mobile and desktop devices.
Pure JavaScript joke app where users click a button to hear jokes via text-to-speech. Optimized for mobile devices with a minimal, engaging, playful design.
Static travel site showcasing tours, customer stories, and contact info. Built with HTML, CSS, and JS for a responsive design with smooth, engaging animations.
